input.organisation_context: Category: crm. No vendor filter selected.
success_factors: Select the strongest vendor for CRM system.

criteria.label: Core CRM Features
criteria.description: Completeness of lead management, pipeline tracking, and contact management modules.

criteria.label: Integrations
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with existing email, marketing automation, and ERP systems.

criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Estimated time and technical resources required for deployment and data migration.

criteria.label: TCO
criteria.description: Combined cost of licensing, implementation, training, and ongoing maintenance over 3 years.

criteria.label: Security & Compliance
criteria.description: Adherence to SOC2, GDPR, and internal data protection standards.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial health and market longevity of the CRM provider.

criteria.label: Strategic Fit
criteria.description: Alignment with long-term digital transformation goals and scalability requirements.
